form.formComment: Last start 5th (Fr4) over 2195m after showing early pace at Ararat, at the bell was 2nd-2 beaten 7 m by Line Up Jacquie (2:45.10) in NR 39 to 45 on March 23 at $12. At the run before 5th (Sr1) over 1710m at this track was 6th-9.17 at the bell, beaten 13 m by Shazza Love (2:04.90) in NR up to 47 on March 19 at $34. Fitter so can show more from this draw.

Nicely drawn and expected to measure up again.
